testsuite.name: com.demo.web.TestMainVerticle
testsuite.system-out: 21:42:26.020 [Test worker] WARN io.netty.resolver.dns.DnsServerAddressStreamProviders -- Can not find io.netty.resolver.dns.macos.MacOSDnsServerAddressStreamProvider in the classpath, fallback to system defaults. This may result in incorrect DNS resolutions on MacOS. Check whether you have a dependency on 'io.netty:netty-resolver-dns-native-macos'
